triples.subject: vgws:MAEER
triples.object: "Maharashtra Academy of Engineering and Educational Research"

triples.subject: vgws:MAEER
triples.object: "Survey No. 124, Kothrud Paud Road, Ex-Servicemen Colony, Pune-411 038"

triples.subject: vgws:VishwashantiGurukulWorldSchool
triples.object: "At. Rajbaug, Loni Kalbhor, District Pune, Maharashtra, India"

triples.subject: vgws:NOC2024
triples.object: "School Education and Sports Department, Government of Maharashtra"

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition1
triples.object: "Adherence to Sections 18 and 19 of the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education Act, 2009."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition2
triples.object: "Strict adherence to Section 12(1)(C) of the RTE Act, 2009 and Maharashtra RTE Rules 2011 (reserved seats)."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition3
triples.object: "Mandatory integration of 'Divyang' (Special Needs) students in every class, per Resolution No. Mise 2015/(119-A)/SD-6 dated 8th January 2016."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition4
triples.object: "Compliance with all state Educational Acts, Rules, and Policies issued periodically."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition5
triples.object: "Mandatory use of State Board or respective Board curriculum for Standard I to VIII."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition6
triples.object: "Compulsory instruction of the Marathi language as a subject from Standard I to X."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition7
triples.object: "Staff salaries must meet or exceed Schedule 'C' of the Maharashtra Employees of Private Schools (Conditions of Service) Regulation Act, 1981."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition8
triples.object: "Compliance with traffic/safety guidelines and fire protection codes per the National Building Code of India, Part-IV Fire 1997."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition9
triples.object: "Mandatory conduct of 3 tests annually for students up to Standard VIII, with achievement data recorded in the SARAL database."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition10
triples.object: "Regular child-wise data entry into SARAL and U-DISE as demanded by State Authorities."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition11
triples.object: "Compliance with the Maharashtra Educational Institutions (Regulation of Fees) Act, 2011."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition12
triples.object: "Compulsory teaching of Indian History and specifically History related to Maharashtra."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition13
triples.object: "Formation of a Complaint Redressal Committee per the Woman and Child Department government resolution dated 19.6.2014."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition14
triples.object: "The fee structure must be published on the official Government RTE portal."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition15
triples.object: "Compulsory entry of student Aadhar Numbers into the SARAL portal."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition16
triples.object: "The State retains the right to withdraw the NOC at any time without notice for rule deviation."

triples.subject: vgws:NOCCondition17
triples.object: "Binding requirement to implement CBSE/ICSE/other board syllabi step-by-step if future affiliation is intended."

triples.subject: vgws:Award6

triples.subject: vgws:Award8

triples.subject: vgws:Award9
triples.object: "India School Rankings: No. 4 in India, No. 1 in Maharashtra (International Residential Schools)"

triples.subject: vgws:Award10
triples.object: "Best India's International Day and Residential School"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ01
triples.object: "What is the full official nomenclature of the institution?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ02
triples.object: "Maharashtra Academy of Engineering and Educational Research (MAEER)."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ04
triples.object: "What is the total area of the institutional grounds?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ05
triples.object: "Why was the 'World School' suffix added to the branding?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ05
triples.object: "To clarify the school's status as an IB Continuum institution and prevent confusion with MAEER's CBSE or other MIT-branded entities."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ06
triples.object: "Yes, it is an International Day and Residential School."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ07
triples.object: "Who is the current Head of School?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ08
triples.object: "What is the registered address of the MAEER Trust?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ08
triples.object: "Survey No. 124, Kothrud Paud Road, Ex-Servicemen Colony, Pune-411 038."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ10
triples.object: "When was the earliest IB program authorized?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ10
triples.object: "The Diploma Programme (DP) was originally authorized in May 2006."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ11
triples.object: "What programs comprise the school's 'IB Continuum' status?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ14
triples.object: "What is the original authorization date for the DP?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ16
triples.object: "Which year groups does the MYP cover?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ18
triples.object: "Who is the signatory for current IB authorizations?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ19
triples.object: "Where is the IB headquarters located for certification purposes?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ20
triples.object: "Is the IB curriculum used for all grades?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ20
triples.object: "The school is authorized for IB for Std. I through Std. XII."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ21
triples.object: "Has the school been recognized for its IB implementation?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ21
triples.object: "Yes, it received the 'Excellence in International Curriculum Practices' award in 2022."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ22
triples.object: "What are the foundational benefits of the IB Continuum?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ22
triples.object: "A visionary approach to education and holistic student development."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ24
triples.object: "How are IB certificates verified for authenticity?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ24
triples.object: "Original certificates feature a hologram and a watermark."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ25
triples.object: "How many distinct IB programs are offered?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ26
triples.object: "What is the status of the school's state recognition?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ26
triples.object: "It holds a valid No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Government of Maharashtra."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ27
triples.object: "Yes, as a subject from Std I to X."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ28
triples.object: "What is the regulatory requirement for inclusive education?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ28
triples.object: "'Divyang' children must be integrated into every class."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ29
triples.object: "What is the mandate regarding regional history?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ30
triples.object: "Where is the fee structure publicly disclosed?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ31
triples.object: "Does the school follow the RTE Act 2009?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ31
triples.object: "Yes, as mandated by NOC conditions 1 and 2."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ32
triples.object: "How is student data tracked by the state?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ33
triples.object: "Under what conditions can the NOC be revoked?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ33
triples.object: "If there is any deviation from state rules or instructions, without prior notice."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ34
triples.object: "What was the school's Education World rank for 2023-24?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ34
triples.object: "No. 4 in India and No. 2 in Maharashtra."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ35
triples.object: "What was the Education World rank for 2025-26?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ35
triples.object: "No. 4 in India and No. 1 in Maharashtra."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ36
triples.object: "Who received the 24th World Education Summit award for the school?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ37
triples.object: "In which NATGEO program was the school featured?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ38
triples.object: "When was the 'School of the Year' title awarded?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ39
triples.object: "What was the Silicon India ranking achievement?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ40
triples.object: "No. 2 in Maharashtra and No. 2 in Pune."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ42
triples.object: "What is the significance of the 'Dynamic Schools 2024' award?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ42
triples.object: "It recognizes exemplary contribution to education in Maharashtra."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ43
triples.object: "How many sports disciplines are supported by the campus infrastructure?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ44
triples.object: "How does the school ensure safety compliance?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ44
triples.object: "Following guidelines from Police, Fire Services, and the Transport Department."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ45
triples.object: "Does the school have a sexual harassment policy?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ45
triples.object: "Yes, a Complaint Redressal Committee is formed as per state mandates."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ46
triples.object: "Yes, registration on the SARAL portal is mandatory."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ47
triples.object: "What is the Sanskrit motto on the official logo?"

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ47
triples.object: "tejasvinavadhitamastu (rendered in Devanagari on the official logo)."

triples.subject: vgws:FAQ48
triples.object: "Mr. Augus P Saptoo and Shri Navin Mittal."
